how.label: HOW IT WORKS · 03 //
how.step1_desc: Create your account, set your trusted contacts, define your comfort zone. Your safety net is ready.
how.step2_desc: Start a secure session with one tap. The AI heatmap activates, your contacts are silently notified.
how.step3_desc: Real-time risk zone alerts. In an emergency: 3 clicks, SOS sent. Simple. Discreet. Effective.

features.label: // 04 · FEATURES
features.f1_title: See dangerous zones. Before entering them.
features.f1_desc: Our AI analyzes real-time reported incidents, crime data, and suspicious behaviors. Result: a heat map telling you where to go — and what to avoid.
features.f1_fear: Because intuition is good. Artificial intelligence is better.
features.f2_title: A silent alert. No one sees it. Everyone receives it.
features.f2_desc: 3 clicks. Without unlocking. Without anyone noticing. Your contacts receive your exact position, an alert, and a live tracking link.
features.f2_fear: In a tense situation, discretion changes everything.
features.f3_title: The shortest route isn't always the best one.
features.f3_desc: Sekura calculates the safest path — not the fastest. Integrating risk zones, recent incidents, and your departure time. Because 10 extra minutes is better than a bad encounter.
features.f3_fear: Navigation re-engineered for those prioritizing personal safety.
features.f4_title: A security advisor in your pocket. 24/7.
features.f4_desc: "I'm walking home alone at 2 AM, is it safe?" Ask the question. The AI analyzes your context, area, and time, providing an honest answer — with alternatives if needed.
features.f4_fear: Not a chatbot. A personal security copilot.
features.mockup_ai_q: I'm walking alone at 2 AM to the hotel, is it safe?
features.mockup_ai_a: I strongly advise against walking. The area around Calle 14 recorded 2 incidents in the last hour. Take a verified Uber instead, I can show you the safest lit pickup spot.

comparatif.label: COMPARISON · 05 //
comparatif.subtitle: What no one else does — and why it matters.
comparatif.badge: ◈ THE ONLY APP BUILT FOR LATAM'S REALITIES

personas.label: // 06 · PROFILES
personas.p1_desc: I travel alone every month to Latin America for international meetings. I often return late at night.
personas.p1_fear: The fear: having to take a taxi at night in an unfamiliar neighborhood.
personas.p1_gain: With Sekura: she knows exactly where to walk. 3 clicks if an emergency occurs.
personas.p2_desc: I work as a night-shift nurse. The walk home at 3 AM terrifies me.
personas.p2_fear: The fear: walking alone through dark streets with nobody knowing where I am.
personas.p2_gain: With Sekura: my family tracks my route. A silent SOS if something happens.
personas.p3_desc: I'm on Erasmus in Bogotá. My parents back in London worry constantly.
personas.p3_fear: The fear: going out in a neighborhood my friends say is safe but is risky at night.
personas.p3_gain: With Sekura: the AI heatmap shows me dangerous zones. My parents are reassured.

faq.label: FAQ · 08 //
faq.q1: Is it free? For how long?
faq.a1: Yes, free during late beta. The first 500 early birds get 3 months of the Smart Safety plan for free. After that: about $4.99/month.
faq.q2: What do you do with my location data?
faq.a2: It's never sold, never analyzed for ads, and never stored past 24h. Your position is only shared with YOUR chosen contacts, and only when you request it.
faq.a3: Heatmaps require an internet connection. But the SOS triggers SMS fallback if you lack data — because that's exactly when you need it most.
faq.a4: At launch: France, Mexico, Colombia, Brazil, Spain. Then expanding to 20 countries by late 2025.
faq.a5: Not yet. Sekura will be available soon. Follow us to be notified as soon as we launch.

cta.label: // 09 · COMING SOON
cta.disclaimer: Sekura will be available soon as a mobile app. Follow us on X (Twitter) for updates.
